item.name: Western Astrology

description.content: Production-ready Western astrology API + remote MCP for AI agents and developers. Hosted MCP server, no local setup, connect Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf in seconds. Natal birth charts, publisher-grade daily/weekly/monthly horoscopes with unique content per sign (house-based transit system, active transits, Moon sign, Moon phase, energy rating), synastry compatibility scores, composite charts, solar and lunar returns, real-time transit aspects, and moon phases. 4 house systems (Placidus, Koch, Whole Sign, Equal) with accurate tropical ephemeris. 23+ endpoints optimized for horoscope platforms, astrology dating apps, AI chatbots, wellness products, and zodiac content engines. Schedule future horoscopes with date parameter for editorial workflows. No astronomy expertise needed.

item.name: Get all zodiac signs - Complete zodiac signs list with dates and elements

request.name: Get all zodiac signs - Complete zodiac signs list with dates and elements

description.content: Returns all 12 tropical zodiac signs (Aries, Taurus, Gemini, Cancer, Leo, Virgo, Libra, Scorpio, Sagittarius, Capricorn, Aquarius, Pisces) with essential information: name, symbol, element (fire, earth, air, water), date ranges, and short descriptions. Perfect for zodiac sign lists, horoscope widgets, birth chart calculators, astrology apps, star sign selectors, and zodiac reference tools. Use GET /signs/{id} for complete zodiac sign profiles with personality traits, compatibility, and detailed characteristics.

query.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

Perfect for horoscope readings, zodiac compatibility checks, birth chart interpretations, astrology blogs, star sign personality analysis, and zodiac meaning databases.

item.name: Generate natal chart - Birth chart calculator API with houses and aspects

request.name: Generate natal chart - Birth chart calculator API with houses and aspects

description.content: Calculate complete Western astrology natal chart (birth chart) with tropical zodiac. Returns all 14 celestial bodies (the 10 classical planets Sun through Pluto, the lunar nodes, Chiron, and Black Moon Lilith), 12 house cusps with customizable house systems (Placidus, Whole Sign, Equal, Koch), major and minor aspects, Ascendant, Midheaven, dominant elements and modalities. Perfect for astrology apps, birth chart generators, horoscope websites, and astrological consultation tools. Verified against NASA JPL Horizons.

query.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

item.name: Get current moon phase - Lunar phase calculator with zodiac sign

request.name: Get current moon phase - Lunar phase calculator with zodiac sign

description.content: Get current moon phase with illumination percentage, lunar age (days since new moon), zodiac sign, and distance from Earth. Returns phase name (New Moon, Waxing Crescent Moon, First Quarter Moon, Waxing Gibbous Moon, Full Moon, Waning Gibbous Moon, Last Quarter Moon, Waning Crescent Moon) plus exact lunar position. Perfect for moon tracking apps, lunar calendars, astrology widgets, and gardening by moon phase tools.

query.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.
Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today if omitted.
Time in 24-hour HH:MM:SS format. Defaults to 12:00:00 (noon). Moon moves ~13 degrees per day so time affects phase precision.
Decimal hours (e.g. 5.5 for IST, -5 for EST) OR IANA name (e.g. "Asia/Kolkata"). IANA resolved to the DST-correct offset for the given date. Defaults to 0 (UTC).

response.name: Moon phase calculated successfully

request.name: Calculate synastry - Relationship compatibility analysis API

description.content: Calculate complete synastry (relationship compatibility) between two natal charts using Western tropical astrology. Analyzes inter-chart aspects between all planets to determine romantic, friendship, and karmic compatibility. Returns compatibility score (0-100), detailed inter-aspects with strength ratings, harmonious vs challenging aspect counts, and relationship dynamics analysis. Perfect for dating apps, matrimonial sites, relationship counseling tools, and astrology compatibility features. Based on professional astrological techniques.

item.name: Calculate planetary aspects - Aspect finder for any date and time

request.name: Calculate planetary aspects - Aspect finder for any date and time

description.content: Calculate all major and minor aspects between planets for any date and time. Finds conjunctions (0°), oppositions (180°), trines (120°), squares (90°), sextiles (60°), and minor aspects. Returns aspect type, exact angle, orb, applying/separating status, and strength (0-100). Filter by specific planets or aspect types. Perfect for aspect tables, transit analysis, and aspect pattern detection. Uses standard Western astrology orbs.

item.name: Detect aspect patterns - Grand Trine, Kite, T-Square, Grand Cross, Yod, Mystic Rectangle, Stellium

request.name: Detect aspect patterns - Grand Trine, Kite, T-Square, Grand Cross, Yod, Mystic Rectangle, Stellium

description.content: Identify classical Western astrology multi-planet configurations in a birth chart. Returns Grand Trines (with element), Kites (with apex), T-Squares (with apex and modality), Grand Crosses (with modality), Yods (Finger of Fate, with apex), Mystic Rectangles, and Stelliums. Each pattern carries a tightness score (0-100), dissociate flag for out-of-sign configurations, and a one-line interpretation suitable for chart reports. Disambiguation is built in: a Grand Cross suppresses its contained T-Squares, a Kite suppresses its underlying Grand Trine. Useful for personalized natal report engines, astrology chatbots, AI agents that interpret chart geometry, and editorial chart-pattern callouts.

query.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

Use tighter orbs (Pontopia "optimal" recommendations). Truthy values (true, 1, yes, on; case-insensitive) narrow trine to 5, square to 5, sextile to 4, quincunx to 2. Defaults to false (industry-standard orbs).

Comma-separated list of optional bodies to include beyond the classical 10 planets. Valid tokens (case-insensitive): chiron, northNode (also accepts north_node, north-node, northnode). Empty by default.

Production-ready Western astrology API + remote MCP for AI agents and developers. Hosted MCP server, no local setup, connect Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf in seconds. Natal birth charts, publisher-grade daily/weekly/monthly horoscopes with unique content per sign (house-based transit system, active transits, Moon sign, Moon phase, energy rating), synastry compatibility scores, composite charts, solar and lunar returns, real-time transit aspects, and moon phases. 4 house systems (Placidus, Koch, Whole Sign, Equal) with accurate tropical ephemeris. 23+ endpoints optimized for horoscope platforms, astrology dating apps, AI chatbots, wellness products, and zodiac content engines. Schedule future horoscopes with date parameter for editorial workflows. No astronomy expertise needed.

# RoxyAPI: AI-Native Insight Infrastructure

> **Base URL:** `https://roxyapi.com/api/v2`
> All endpoint paths below are relative to this base URL.

The only multi-domain spiritual intelligence API. 12 domains (astrology, Vedic astrology, human design, forecast, biorhythm, tarot, numerology, crystals, dreams, I-Ching, angel numbers, location), 148+ endpoints, one API key, instant activation. Remote MCP server per domain plus AGENTS.md for AI coding agents.

## Who uses RoxyAPI

- **Developers** building astrology apps, tarot platforms, numerology calculators, or dream journals
- **AI agent builders** connecting Claude, GPT, or Gemini to real calculation engines via MCP
- **Vibe coders** shipping insight apps with Cursor, Bolt, or Replit using zero domain knowledge
- **Founders and brands** launching branded spiritual experiences for their audience

## Quick start (60 seconds)

**1. Get your API key** at [roxyapi.com/pricing](https://roxyapi.com/pricing). Instant delivery, no account required.

**2. Make your first call:**
```bash
curl -H "X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY" https://roxyapi.com/api/v2/tarot/draw -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"count": 3}'
```

**3. Monitor usage:**
```bash
curl -H "X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY" https://roxyapi.com/api/v2/usage
```

## AI agent integration (MCP)

RoxyAPI has native Model Context Protocol support. Your AI agent auto-discovers all 148+ endpoints as callable tools with zero configuration:
- **Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf**: Add MCP server URL in settings
- **OpenAI Agents, Gemini ADK**: Connect via Streamable HTTP transport
- **Custom agents**: Use the MCP Python/TypeScript SDK

MCP endpoints: `https://roxyapi.com/mcp/{domain}` (e.g., `/mcp/astrology`, `/mcp/tarot`)

Setup guide: [roxyapi.com/docs/mcp](https://roxyapi.com/docs/mcp)

## Authentication

All endpoints require an API key via header or query param:
- **Header (recommended):** `X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY`
- **Query param (testing):** `?api_key=YOUR_KEY`

## Response format

Clean JSON, no wrapper objects. Errors return `{ "error": "message", "code": "error_code" }`. The `error` field is human-readable (may change wording). The `code` field is machine-readable (stable — safe to switch on programmatically).

Rate limit headers on every response: `X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`, `X-RateLimit-Used`

## Errors

All errors return `{ "error": "message", "code": "error_code" }`:

| Status | Code | When |
|--------|------|------|
| 400 | `validation_error` | Missing or invalid parameters. Response includes `issues[]` with per-field `path`, `message`, `code`, `expected`, `minimum`, `maximum`, `format`, `pattern`. |
| 401 | `api_key_required` | No API key provided |
| 401 | `invalid_api_key` | Key format invalid or tampered |
| 401 | `subscription_not_found` | Key references non-existent subscription |
| 401 | `subscription_inactive` | Subscription cancelled, expired, or suspended |
| 404 | `not_found` | Resource not found. Response may include a ranked `suggestions[]` array (each with `endpoint`, `hint`, and a `docs` deep link) for typo recovery. |
| 405 | `method_not_allowed` | Path exists for a different HTTP method. Response includes `allow[]` and the `Allow` header lists valid methods. |
| 429 | `rate_limit_exceeded` | Monthly quota reached |
| 500 | `internal_error` | Server error |

## Pricing

Flat per-request pricing. Every call counts the same, whether a planet position or a full birth chart with aspects. No credit systems, no variable costs. Plans from $39 to $699/month.

See [roxyapi.com/pricing](https://roxyapi.com/pricing)

## Resources

- [Quickstart guide](https://roxyapi.com/docs/quickstart) - first API call in 60 seconds
- [Documentation](https://roxyapi.com/docs) - guides, tutorials, domain reference
- [MCP setup](https://roxyapi.com/docs/mcp) - connect AI agents
- [Starter apps](https://roxyapi.com/starters) - clone and deploy in 30 minutes
- [FAQ](https://roxyapi.com/faq) - common questions
- [Contact](https://roxyapi.com/contact) - support and API key recovery
